cases.task: Verify an official protocol source before making route-changing claims about HTTP fetch behavior.
Verify a current release/version source before treating version facts as fresh.
Verify a third-party capability package before deciding whether an MCP-related provider exists.
Fetch a third-party tool README before designing a new durable research capability.
Research a paid or credentialed search provider without activating credentials or billing.
Represent a runtime where network fetch is unavailable so Thinking does not invent current facts.

innovationScenarios.gapEvidence: Existing agents, skills, scripts, MCP providers, runtime tools, and dependencies can fetch sources, but none owns reusable evidence freshness plus Thinking handoff synthesis.
alternativePaths: keep as run-scoped workerTask for one-off evidence synthesis
create a project-local script candidate after repeat evidence
upgrade to MCP provider only if external credentialed systems become necessary
innovationScenarios.minimumExperiment: Generate a read-only research execution report with live fetch, cache policy, and no canonical writes.

innovationScenarios.gapEvidence: When every existing capability type is insufficient, the system needs a candidate sandbox instead of pretending the answer is always create_skill.
alternativePaths: produce an innovationCandidatePacket for Warden review
reuse an existing owner only if Fetch evidence proves fit
innovationScenarios.minimumExperiment: Emit innovationCandidatePacket with canonicalWrites=0 and explicit Warden approval requirement.
